title: 22mm x 22mm x 15mm Reducing Tee - End Feed - Bag of 5
features: This listing is for a Pack of 5
Please note that a reducing tee is measured as follows with the tee facing up: 1st stated measurement is Left, 2nd stated measurement is right, 3rd stated measurement is facing up

These fittings are relatively easy to install and require minimal preparation. They typically involve cleaning the pipe end, applying flux, and soldering the fitting onto the pipe, creating a strong and permanent bond.
Copper is highly resistant to heat, making end feed fittings suitable for high-temperature applications without compromising performance or durability.
description: Copper End Feed Reducing Tee - 22mm x 22mm x 15mm. Introducing the Copper Reducing Tee - 22mm x 22mm x 15mm, a fitting designed to connect your pipes seamlessly with a female connection. Crafted from durable copper material, it ensures a tight seal, minimising the risk of leaks.The magic happens through capillary action, ensuring a robust connection that withstands the test of time. Grab these tees, carefully sourced and competitively priced, for a seamless copper solution.Other sizes Available: Reducing Tee - 8mm, 10mm, 15mm, 22mm, 28mm, 35mm, 42mm and 54mm.
